title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: April 27, 2023
summary: April 27 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a larger decrease , since last week, by a rate of 2.30% , from the level on 04/20/2023 of 14.012 M km 2 to 13.690 M km 2 for this week. The recent daily up and down variability from the past few weeks now appears to have ended with a consistent sea...
